reviews.comment:
Mejoro en relacion a como era antes.
Pero podria estar mucho mejor, deberia ser una ypf full con comida y demas, mejores mesas y sillas, una segunda caja de atencion,  y ahi si le daria 5 estrellas. Es una Estacion de renombre y considerando que es una parada obligada y concurre mucha gente, tanto locales como turistas.
La ultima vez que estuve (enero/2018) el cafe estaba malo y no tenian alfajores simples de la marca de color 'lila', solo triples. Muchos empleados y sin embargo un solo empleado atendiendo una larga cola de clientes.
Tampoco tenian ciertos combustibles.
Lo mejor que tienen son los baños.
Ojala mejoren aun mas. Aguante Garayalde!

(Translated by Google)
It's improved compared to how it was before.
But it could be much better. It should be a full YPF station with food and other amenities, better tables and chairs, a second cash register, and then I'd give it 5 stars. It's a well-known station, considering it's a must-stop and is crowded, both locals and tourists.
The last time I was there (January 2018), the coffee was bad, and they didn't have the "lilac" brand of plain alfajores, only triple-packed. There were a lot of employees, yet only one employee serving a long line of customers.
They also didn't have certain fuels.
The best thing they have are the bathrooms.
I hope they improve even more. Go Garayalde!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMWFEbzNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención solo que el kiosco poco surtido y lo malo sería que dejen de recibir tarjetas ya que llevar efectivo se hace incómodo . Revisar los baños y las instalaciones para mantener más limpieza. Tendrían que poner algunos juegos para los chicos ya que es de paso a Trelew o comodoro Rivadavia y son varias horas ...

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but the kiosk is a bit understocked, and the downside would be if they stopped accepting cards, as carrying cash is inconvenient. The bathrooms and facilities should be cleaned more thoroughly. They should add some games for the kids, as it's on the way to Trelew or Comodoro Rivadavia, and it takes several hours...
